Article.ArticleTitle: Probabilistic OPF and LFC of conventional with RES, energy storage and FACTS using DTBO.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Electrical Engineering, NIT, Mizoram, India.
Department of Electrical Engineering, Dr. B. C. Roy Engineering College, Durgapur, India.

KeywordList.Keyword: FACTS (TCSC, TCPS and SVC) Driving Training Based Optimization (DTBO)

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Competing interests: In order to ascertain the accomplishment documented in the research report, the writers affirm that they have no specific communications or competing economic considerations. Ethical approval: The research article does not include a number of works that either author has created that deal with mortal fields or animals.
